作者玻璃心，看到恶评会爆掉[心碎]。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o6d68cec2864a9798251625f3bb8ce6bd~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"折耳灰毛雪","author_id":"","book_id":"7349480775844121662","book_name":"当仙门第一厚脸皮幡然醒悟","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e8e8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7349482000811573822","read_count":"223","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"233294"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"102","tags":"双男主,古代,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o6d68cec2864a9798251625f3bb8ce6bd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779382774&x-signature=9Mmeo4f1pCiBwdDPfu4fijd8s7A%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2692069034304412","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"58"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323005934951BBF3B2CD51914D395"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2287,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8498,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":154},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7489633573484528446","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好看好看[哭][哭]评分怎么这么低呀，还好最后是好的结局，停宝这一路走来真的太不容易了，从小过的是锦衣玉食的日子性格也很好，自从修仙后没受过的委屈统统都受了，人物刻画不是那种心系苍生正道修仙的，顺应自己的本心选择适合自己的方式修了魔，但是小停也是很好的宝宝很心疼，长析也很好很好，一直给停宝无限的纵容，两人个都是很好很好的，比较意难平的可能是停宝还没见到自己的爸爸妈妈最后一面，和黎兰他们，也没有办法回到在宜停居比较快乐的日子啦。停宝对长析的感情由一开始的厌恶到恐惧，到后来的依赖和眷恋，真是因为长析真的一直站在他身边，为停宝做了很多很多。熬夜看完的好看好看[哭]","text_exts":[{"e":169,"s":166,"text":"意难平","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%84%8F%E9%9A%BE%E5%B9%B3&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741987741914D395%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227489633573484528446%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227349480775844121662%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%84%8F%E9%9A%BE%E5%B9%B3%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743824538,"group_id":"7349480775844121662","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NywmvQfjYVMrgK86o5W2DWY=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2ac9cd99c08f46d3962589cb5e3596fc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792578&x-signature=QEiUkww286m5vue9TN4UDMQ7dz8%3D","user_id":"108666690363","user_name":"命比咖啡苦TvT"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"108666690363","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7349480775844121662","book_info":{"abstract":"一句话简介：
